heading: Requisitions
label: 523 Requisitions
text: The Attorney General shall sign all requisitions for the advance or payment of moneys appropriated for the Department of Justice, out of the Treasury, subject to the same control as is exercised on like estimates or accounts by the Government Accountability Office.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 319R.S. § 369.The words “General Accounting Office” are substituted for “First Auditor or First Comptroller of the Treasury” on authority of the , .Act of June 10, 1921, ch. 18, § 30442 Stat. 24
Amendments2004— substituted “Government Accountability Office” for “General Accounting Office”.Pub. L. 108–271
